sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to smite with a rod or staff
2. to smite in the face with the palm of the hand, to box the ear
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a derivative of ῥέπω rhepō, a primary word, (to let fall, “rap”); to slap (with the palm of the hand): - smite (with the palm of the hand). Compare G5180.
